<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/federation/tombstones"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Tombstone poll route.

Requires tombstone:read capability token. Covered by Spec-X2-RTBF-Tombstones.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
